name: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability with Risky EKU
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Orlinum , BlueDefenZer
SIGMA Title: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability with Risky EKU
SIGMA Description: Detects certificate creation with template allowing risk permission subject and risky EKU

False positives:
- Administrator activity
- Proxy SSL certificate with subject modification
- Smart card enrollement

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((("Event ID"=4898 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.2.3.4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.4.1.311.20.2.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%2.5.29.37.0%')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%') OR (("Event ID"=4899 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.2.3.4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.4.1.311.20.2.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%2.5.29.37.0%')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability with Risky EKU on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((("Event ID"=4898 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.2.3.4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.4.1.311.20.2.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%2.5.29.37.0%')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%') OR (("Event ID"=4899 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.5.2.3.4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%1.3.6.1.4.1.311.20.2.2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%2.5.29.37.0%')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability with Risky EKU
